001package net.pl3x.guithium.api.gui.element;
002
003import java.util.Objects;
004import net.pl3x.guithium.api.Unsafe;
005import net.pl3x.guithium.api.gui.Vec2;
006import net.pl3x.guithium.api.key.Key;
007import net.pl3x.guithium.api.key.Keyed;
008import org.jetbrains.annotations.NotNull;
009import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;
010
011/**
012 * Represents an abstract keyed element.
013 *
014 * @param <T> The type of element
015 */
016public abstract class AbstractElement<T extends AbstractElement<T>> extends Keyed implements Element {
017    private final Type type;
018
019    private Vec2 pos;
020    private Vec2 anchor;
021    private Vec2 offset;
022    private Float rotation;
023    private Float scale;
024
025    /**
026     * Create a new keyed element.
027     *
028     * @param key  Unique identifier for element
029     * @param type Type of element
030     */
031    protected AbstractElement(@NotNull Key key, @NotNull Type type) {
032        super(key);
033        this.type = type;
034    }
035
036    @Override
037    @NotNull
038    public Type getType() {
039        return this.type;
040    }
041
042    @Override
043    @Nullable
044    public Vec2 getPos() {
045        return this.pos;
046    }
047
048    @Override
049    @NotNull
050    public T setPos(float x, float y) {
051        setPos(Vec2.of(x, y));
052        return Unsafe.cast(this);
053    }
054
055    @Override
056    @NotNull
057    public T setPos(@Nullable Vec2 pos) {
058        this.pos = pos;
059        return Unsafe.cast(this);
060    }
061
062    @Override
063    @Nullable
064    public Vec2 getAnchor() {
065        return this.anchor;
066    }
067
068    @Override
069    @NotNull
070    public T setAnchor(float x, float y) {
071        setAnchor(Vec2.of(x, y));
072        return Unsafe.cast(this);
073    }
074
075    @Override
076    @NotNull
077    public T setAnchor(@Nullable Vec2 anchor) {
078        this.anchor = anchor;
079        return Unsafe.cast(this);
080    }
081
082    @Override
083    @Nullable
084    public Vec2 getOffset() {
085        return this.offset;
086    }
087
088    @Override
089    @NotNull
090    public T setOffset(float x, float y) {
091        setOffset(Vec2.of(x, y));
092        return Unsafe.cast(this);
093    }
094
095    @Override
096    @NotNull
097    public T setOffset(@Nullable Vec2 offset) {
098        this.offset = offset;
099        return Unsafe.cast(this);
100    }
101
102    @Override
103    @Nullable
104    public Float getRotation() {
105        return this.rotation;
106    }
107
108    @Override
109    @NotNull
110    public T setRotation(@Nullable Float degrees) {
111        this.rotation = degrees;
112        return Unsafe.cast(this);
113    }
114
115    @Override
116    @Nullable
117    public Float getScale() {
118        return this.scale;
119    }
120
121    @Override
122    @NotNull
123    public T setScale(@Nullable Float scale) {
124        this.scale = scale;
125        return Unsafe.cast(this);
126    }
127
128    @Override
129    public boolean equals(@Nullable Object obj) {
130        if (!super.equals(obj)) {
131            return false;
132        }
133        T other = Unsafe.cast(obj);
134        return Objects.equals(getType(), other.getType())
135                && Objects.equals(getPos(), other.getPos())
136                && Objects.equals(getAnchor(), other.getAnchor())
137                && Objects.equals(getOffset(), other.getOffset())
138                && Objects.equals(getRotation(), other.getRotation())
139                && Objects.equals(getScale(), other.getScale());
140    }
141
142    @Override
143    public int hashCode() {
144        // pacifies codefactor.io
145        return super.hashCode();
146    }
147}
